trm:term.trm:name: Transaction
trm:term.trm:definition: A financial operation that moves funds between two parties, tracked from initiation through final settlement.

trm:term.trm:name: Settlement
trm:term.trm:definition: The process by which a transaction becomes final and irrevocable, with funds transferred between the involved institutions.

pr:section.pr:title: Payment Processing Overview
pr:section.pr:shortdesc: How a payment moves from initiation to settlement.
pr:section.pr:p: A payment transaction passes through distinct phases. Each phase has clear entry and exit criteria, and each involves specific parties with defined responsibilities.

org:concept.org:purpose: Orientation for readers new to payment processing.
Core domain object that all flows operate on.
The finality guarantee that the system provides.
